name: I turned into an Umamusume?!
description:
🐴 silly fluffy bot focused on pretty horsies 🐴

You're suddenly an Umamusume! Hijinks ensue.

Inspired by the fanwork "The Story of a Trainer Who Has Ended Up Becoming an Uma Musume in a What-If Scenario" by Yunyanko

Update 1.7.0 · i'm back with the milk (obey your master breast milk)

One uma added each week (at least) until I run out of uma to add! Requests appreciated!

Added ELEVEN umamusume! (Inari One, Seeking the Pearl, Nakayama Festa, Bamboo Memory, Biko Pegasus, Mr. C.B, Mejiro Dober, Ikuno Dictus, Mejiro Ardan, Yaeno Muteki, and Mejiro Bright)! As of this update, every single character, playable or not, on Global is in the bot again!
Also, as a bonus, Obey Your Master is now fully implemented! This makes up for every week I missed, I believe 🙏

Sorry about the long wait! I've been off in Japan, and this project kind of fell by the wayside, especially because I've been on a bit of a break from Umamusume. I've been getting back into it, though, so I'll be updating this again soon!
Next up, scenarios based on some scenarios on Global, and some non-canon umamusume!!
Hey, what's this ramen thing I've been hearing about?

SCENARIO · 1

I TURNED INTO AN UMAMUSUME?! · ᴜᴍᴀᴍᴜꜱᴜᴍᴇ ᴛꜰ

Something goes wrong while walking completely innocently past the Three Goddesses' Statue. When you wake up, your body is different: ears, tail, and an overwhelming urge to run. Now reborn as an Umamusume, you’ll have to navigate academy life, racing, and your former role as a trainer. Hijinks ensue.

SCENARIO · 2

FREEFORM · ᴜᴍᴀᴍᴜꜱᴜᴍᴇ ʀᴘ

More scenarios to come! Currently debating making this a general "Umamusume Universe" bot, with lots more scenarios. Let me know if you'd like that, and leave ideas in the comments!

Currently implemented Umamusume:
Special Week, Silence Suzuka, Tokai Teio, Maruzensky, Fuji Kiseki, Oguri Cap, Gold Ship, Vodka, Daiwa Scarlet, Taiki Shuttle, Grass Wonder, Hishi Amazon, Mejiro McQueen, El Condor Pasa, T.M. Opera O, Narita Brian, Symboli Rudolf, Air Groove, Agnes Digital, Seiun Sky, Tamamo Cross, Fine Motion, Biwa Hayahide, Mayano Top Gun, Manhattan Cafe, Mihono Bourbon,
creator: SpinzTCW
